jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Pilgrim
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Pilgrim! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Pilgrim:
Pilgrim is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pilgrim!
